On this page

  • Introduction
    • Read locations and convert to simple features (sf object)
    • Make tracks
    • Make tracks
  1. Movement analysis
  2. Movement rates

Create tracks

Introduction

Objectives:

  • Create minimum convex polygons for individual caribou
  • Calculate movement rates
library(sf)
library(amt)
library(tidyverse)

Read locations and convert to simple features (sf object)

gps <- read.csv('../data/yt/gps.csv') |>
  mutate(timestamp=as.POSIXct(timestamp),
    id = ID, x=longitude, y=latitude)
glimpse(gps)
Rows: 90,864
Columns: 8
$ timestamp <dttm> 2020-11-06 19:10:39, 2020-11-07 01:07:00, 2020-11-07 07:05:…
$ longitude <dbl> -129.2876, -129.3327, -129.3022, -129.3021, -129.3146, -129.…
$ latitude  <dbl> 60.24530, 60.19127, 60.17469, 60.17254, 60.14960, 60.14822, …
$ ID        <int> 43163, 43163, 43163, 43163, 43163, 43163, 43163, 43163, 4316…
$ season    <chr> "earlywinter", "earlywinter", "earlywinter", "earlywinter", …
$ id        <int> 43163, 43163, 43163, 43163, 43163, 43163, 43163, 43163, 4316…
$ x         <dbl> -129.2876, -129.3327, -129.3022, -129.3021, -129.3146, -129.…
$ y         <dbl> 60.24530, 60.19127, 60.17469, 60.17254, 60.14960, 60.14822, …

Make tracks

caribou <- sf::st_read('../data/yt_caribou.gpkg', 'gps')
Reading layer `gps' from data source 
  `C:\Users\PIVER37\Documents\little_rancheria\data\yt_caribou.gpkg' 
  using driver `GPKG'
Simple feature collection with 90864 features and 3 fields
Geometry type: POINT
Dimension:     XY
Bounding box:  xmin: 518681.7 ymin: 480918.5 xmax: 716666.7 ymax: 651698.2
Projected CRS: NAD83 / Yukon Albers
glimpse(caribou)
Rows: 90,864
Columns: 4
$ timestamp <chr> "2020-11-06 19:10:39", "2020-11-07 01:07:00", "2020-11-07 07…
$ ID        <int> 43163, 43163, 43163, 43163, 43163, 43163, 43163, 43163, 4316…
$ season    <chr> "earlywinter", "earlywinter", "earlywinter", "earlywinter", …
$ geom      <POINT [m]> POINT (678102.7 642940.6), POINT (675905.1 636811.4), …
caribou <- mutate(caribou, x_=st_coordinates(caribou)[,1],
    y_=st_coordinates(caribou)[,2],
    t_=ymd_hms(timestamp),
    id=paste0('C',ID),
    name='Caribou',
    timestamp=NULL, ID=NULL) |>
    st_drop_geometry()
glimpse(caribou)
Rows: 90,864
Columns: 6
$ season <chr> "earlywinter", "earlywinter", "earlywinter", "earlywinter", "ea…
$ x_     <dbl> 678102.7, 675905.1, 677688.9, 677707.0, 677144.5, 675848.0, 676…
$ y_     <dbl> 642940.6, 636811.4, 635054.2, 634815.6, 632232.1, 632013.4, 632…
$ t_     <dttm> 2020-11-06 19:10:39, 2020-11-07 01:07:00, 2020-11-07 07:05:54,…
$ id     <chr> "C43163", "C43163", "C43163", "C43163", "C43163", "C43163", "C4…
$ name   <chr> "Caribou", "Caribou", "Caribou", "Caribou", "Caribou", "Caribou…

Make tracks

tr <- make_track(caribou, x_, y_, t_, name = id, crs = 3578)
print(summarize_sampling_rate_many(tr, cols='name'), n=25)
# A tibble: 25 × 10
   name     min    q1 median  mean    q3    max     sd     n unit 
 * <chr>  <dbl> <dbl>  <dbl> <dbl> <dbl>  <dbl>  <dbl> <int> <chr>
 1 C43161 0.474  5.98   5.98  7.14  5.99 1173.  27.9    1759 hour 
 2 C43147 5.94   5.98   5.98  6.01  5.98   12.0  0.389  2126 hour 
 3 C43146 5.94   5.98   5.98  6.01  5.98   29.9  0.505  4898 hour 
 4 C43144 5.94   5.98   5.98  6.00  5.98   12.0  0.283  4908 hour 
 5 C43159 5.94   5.98   5.98  6.00  5.98   12.0  0.351  4904 hour 
 6 C43141 5.94   5.98   5.98  6.01  5.98   29.9  0.573  4901 hour 
 7 C43158 5.94   5.98   5.98  6.00  5.98   12.0  0.356  2259 hour 
 8 C43164 5.94   5.98   5.98  6.01  5.98   29.9  0.483  4899 hour 
 9 C43150 5.94   5.98   5.98  6.06  5.99   29.9  1.04    693 hour 
10 C43154 5.94   5.98   5.98  6.00  5.98   29.9  0.435  4902 hour 
11 C43145 5.94   5.98   5.98  6.00  5.98   29.9  0.418  4904 hour 
12 C43143 5.94   5.98   5.98  5.99  5.98   12.0  0.241  4910 hour 
13 C43140 5.94   5.98   5.98  6.01  5.98   29.9  0.505  4890 hour 
14 C43155 5.94   5.98   5.98  6.06  5.98   29.9  0.992   976 hour 
15 C43156 5.95   5.98   5.98  6.05  5.98   29.9  1.17    445 hour 
16 C43160 5.94   5.98   5.98  6.01  5.98   29.9  0.483  4895 hour 
17 C43152 5.94   5.98   5.98  6.00  5.98   12.0  0.270  4907 hour 
18 C43148 5.95   5.98   5.98  6.01  5.98   29.9  0.554  2562 hour 
19 C43151 5.94   5.98   5.98  6.02  5.99   12.0  0.484  1823 hour 
20 C43142 5.94   5.98   5.98  6.03  5.98  126.   1.76   4874 hour 
21 C43149 5.94   5.98   5.98  6.02  5.99   29.9  0.621  2496 hour 
22 C43162 5.94   5.98   5.98  6.03  5.98   29.9  0.704  2230 hour 
23 C43153 5.94   5.98   5.98  6.00  5.98   53.9  0.720  4896 hour 
24 C43157 5.94   5.98   5.98  6.01  5.98   29.9  0.468  4890 hour 
25 C43163 5.94   5.98   5.98  6.00  5.98   12    0.331  4892 hour
Caribou locations
Minimum convex polygons
